BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-ResidueNotes
BundleInfo.Author: Oliver Clarke
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Read, browse, edit, and export Coot residue annotations embedded in mmCIF files.
BundleInfo.Description: A first-pass ChimeraX bundle for reading and writing the custom _cootnote_residue_note.* mmCIF loop written by coot_trimmings. It provides a simple residue-notes tool window with residue navigation and explicit import/export of annotated mmCIF files.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: Tool :: Residue Notes :: General :: Browse residue annotations embedded in mmCIF files
Command :: resnotes :: General :: Open the Residue Notes tool
Command :: resnotes import :: General :: Import residue notes from an mmCIF file
Command :: resnotes export :: General :: Export an annotated mmCIF file
Command :: resnotes export-markdown :: General :: Export residue notes as a Markdown table
Command :: resnotes refresh :: General :: Refresh the Residue Notes tool state
